Off Calendar Sep-09-2009 Granted Per Written Order

PETITION FOR PROBATE OF WILL AND FOR LETTERS TESTAMENTARY
Off Calendar Aug-26-2009 Continued To Sep-09-09 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jaime Mannon for and with Ronald Montez (Petitioner).

Mr. Mannon stated that the Notary did not want to sign a declaration regarding the will execution and that he could obtain verification from the Notary Association confirming the Notary's signature. The matter was continued to September 9, 2009 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley, CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy K. Sandberg.
